symbols.name: EntityFrameworkGenericRepository
symbols.summary: EntityFrameworkGenericRepository is a generic repository for Entity Framework, providing essential CRUD operations for entity types.

syntax.content: public class EntityFrameworkGenericRepository : EntityFrameworkReadOnlyGenericRepository, IGenericRepository, IGenericReadOnlyRepository, IRepository where TEntity : class, IEntity

symbols.name: EntityFrameworkGenericRepository(EntityFrameworkRepositoryOptions)
symbols.summary: A generic repository class for Entity Framework, providing basic CRUD operations on entities.

symbols.name: EntityFrameworkGenericRepository(Builder)
symbols.summary: Specifies an Entity Framework repository to manage entities of type TEntity.

symbols.name: EntityFrameworkGenericRepository(ILoggerFactory, DbContext)
symbols.summary: A generic repository for performing CRUD operations on an entity using Entity Framework.

symbols.name: UpdateSetAsync(Action>, IFindOptions, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Updates all entities in the repository by applying the specified property assignments in a set-based operation.

syntax.content: public virtual Task UpdateSetAsync(Action> set, IFindOptions options = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: The builder action that defines which properties are updated and how their values are assigned.
Optional query options used to shape the update operation.
A token to monitor for cancellation requests.

returns.description: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains the number of affected entities.
